title: LibreSpot Backend Event Protocol v1
description: Versioned contract for the pipe-delimited event protocol between the PowerShell backend and the WPF desktop shell.

protocolVersion.description: Protocol version. Increment when adding new required kinds or breaking delimiter/escaping rules.

prefix.description: Every structured message line starts with this prefix followed by a pipe delimiter.

delimiter.description: Pipe character separates prefix, kind, level, and payload. Maximum 4 segments.

escaping.description: Payload escaping rules applied before emission.

newlines.description: CR, LF, and CRLF sequences in the payload are replaced with a single space before writing.

kinds.description: Known message kinds. Unknown kinds MUST be handled as log entries by the parser.

progress.description: Numeric 0-100 in the payload. Parser clamps out-of-range values.

status.description: Human-readable status text for the main status line.

step.description: Human-readable step text for the secondary status line.

result.description: Terminal message. Level SUCCESS means the run completed normally.

log.description: General log line. Also the fallback kind for lines without the protocol prefix.

levels.description: Known severity levels. SUCCESS is only valid for result kind.

missingPrefix.description: Lines that do not start with the prefix are treated as plain log output.

insufficientParts.description: Lines with fewer than 4 pipe-separated segments after the prefix are treated as plain log.

unknownKind.description: The parser must not reject unknown kinds. They are forwarded to the log/default handler.

emptyPayload.description: An empty payload after the final pipe is valid for any kind.
